NAVAREA XIX 7/19
1.RIGLIST CORRECT AT 140630 UTC JAN 2019
NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N. EAST OF 5W

71-51.6N - 032-25.6E WEST HERCULES
71-47.4N - 021-07.3E LEIV ERIKSSON
67-37.2N - 006-45.6E TRANSOCEAN SPITSBERGEN
65-22.6N - 007-22.1E TRANSOCEAN ENCOURAGE

NOTES:
A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METER SAFETY ZONE
B. ACP-ADJACENT TO CHARTED PLATFORM
C. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N. REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW

2.CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 4/19
